column2: # NOAA ISD-Lite hourly download (direct from NOAA)
# Separate files for KCLE, KBKL, KCGF
# Detect station name column in YOUR file (includes "STATION NAME")
stop("Could not find a station name column in isd-history.csv. Columns are:\n",
ICAO = if ("ICAO" %in% names(.)) str_to_upper(as.character(ICAO)) else NA_character_,
CALL = if ("CALL" %in% names(.)) str_to_upper(as.character(CALL)) else NA_character_,
# ---- Helper: check if a NOAA URL exists ----
# ---- 3) Pick best USAF/WBAN match for each ICAO ----
# Try ICAO first (and CALL if present)
# If not found, fall back to station name keywords
stop("No station-history match found for ", icao, " covering your date window.")
# Choose first candidate that has files for all requested years
return(cand[i, ] %>% select(USAF, WBAN, STATION_NAME_UP, ICAO, LAT, LON, BEGIN, END))
stop("Found metadata matches for ", icao, " but none had ISD-Lite files for 2023 & 2024.")
# ---- 4) Download + unzip ISD-Lite for a given year ----
gunzip(local_gz, destname = local_txt, overwrite = TRUE, remove = FALSE)
# ---- 6) Main loop: build + save one file per station ----
message("Using match: ", ids$STATION_NAME_UP, " | USAF=", ids$USAF, " WBAN=", ids$WBAN)
